summary: Full backend + frontend E2E testing for Fittyfit v1. All 16 pytest cases pass (auth, profile, medications, alerts, SOS, dashboard, coach chat via gpt-4o, food analyze by name and image, voice summary). Frontend: landing renders, signup -> 3-step onboarding -> dashboard flow works, JWT stored in localStorage key 'fittyfit_token', all 7 AppShell nav routes navigate correctly, protected routes redirect to /login when token removed, AI Coach returns caring reply, Food analysis shows verdict card, Medications CRUD + mark taken/missed works, Voice Summary renders, Alerts list populates, SOS triggers and history updates.

issues: 'Voice Summary' and 'Alerts' sidebar labels render with a translucent/muted color that has lower contrast vs. active/other items (visible in dashboard screenshot). Consider tightening text color contrast against the soft-blue background for AA compliance.

action_items: Optional: improve contrast for inactive sidebar nav items in AppShell (Voice Summary / Alerts appear faded).
Optional: current /api/medications/log auto-creates a 'missed' alert without de-duplication; multiple misses for the same med within the same day will keep stacking alerts.
Note: voice call is MOCKED (Web Speech API only) as declared in review request — no real phone integration.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py (~515 lines) — manageable but will grow; consider splitting routers (auth, meds, coach, food, voice, alerts, sos) once it crosses 700 lines.
JWT_SECRET has a default fallback 'dev-secret'. In production code, refuse to boot if the secret is missing (already configured in /app/backend/.env; just tighten default).
coach_chat and food_analyze catch broad Exception and bubble the raw message back as 500 detail — fine for MVP, but consider suppressing provider-specific strings from the public error payload.
food_analyze accepts data URL prefix and also raw base64; good defensive parsing.
All Mongo queries correctly exclude _id via projection {'_id': 0} — no ObjectId leakage spotted.
seed_data_creation: Created (if not present) demo.shanti@fittyfit.in via signup fixture. Created transient UI user qa.<ts>@fittyfit.in during signup flow test. Added TEST_ prefixed meds/logs/alerts during testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend test file at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py covers full API surface with real EMERGENT_LLM_KEY calls (coach, food by name + by generated real JPEG image, voice summary). Reuse as regression. Frontend E2E verified via Playwright against REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL. AI endpoints take 5-15s; use 60-90s timeouts when retesting. All data-testids in place for: brand-link, nav-signin, nav-getstarted, hero-*, footer-cta, login-*, signup-*, role-*, ob-*, onboarding-card, dashboard-greeting, dashboard-sos, nav-{dashboard,coach,food,medications,voice,alerts,profile}, coach-{messages,input,send,suggestion-i}, food-{upload-input,upload-trigger,name-input,analyze-btn,result}, med-{add-toggle,form,name,dosage,time,frequency,save,item-<id>,taken-<id>,missed-<id>,delete-<id>}, alert-<id>, alert-read-<id>, sos-emergency-button, profile-edit.
rca_of_the_issue: No bugs detected — first implementation iteration tests clean.
